extortion.description: Bender GmbH & Co. KG, a prominent international company based in Germany that specializes in electrical safety solutions. Founded over 75 years ago, Bender is recognized as one of the leading providers of products and services aimed at making electrical infrastructures smarter and safer. The company employs more than 1,350 individuals and focuses on various sectors including healthcare, manufacturing, renewable energy, and data centers.SITE: www.bender.de Address : Londorfer Straße 65 35305 Grünberg GermanyTEL#: +49 6401 807-0ALL DATA SIZE: ≈1.1tb 1. Company data 2. Personal data 3. Confidential data, privat accounting 4. R&D 5. Drawings 6. HR & etc…
